name: MyOTP.App
description: Multi-channel OTP delivery (SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram) for phone verification and 2FA. Cleaner alternative to Twilio Verify with transparent per-message pricing and direct carrier connections via Broadnet.

auth.obtain_instructions: Sign up at myotp.app/sign-up (15 free trial credits, no card required), then generate an API key in the dashboard. Add your server IP (or `*` for testing) to the IP whitelist for that key.

tools.name: generate_otp
tools.description: Send a one-time password to a phone number via SMS, WhatsApp, or Telegram. Returns a message_id for later verification.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: Destination phone number, digits only, no leading + or 0. Example: 14155551234 for a US number.

parameters.name: otp_length
parameters.description: Number of digits in the OTP. Telegram requires 4-8.

parameters.name: otp_validity
parameters.description: OTP expiry in seconds. Range 30-14400 (30-3600 for Telegram).

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: Sender brand name. Letters, numbers, dots only; 3-16 chars.

parameters.name: force_send
parameters.description: Set to true to issue a new OTP even if one is already active for this phone number.

parameters.name: return_otp
parameters.description: Set to true to include the OTP code in the response (testing or custom delivery).

tools.name: verify_otp
tools.description: Verify a one-time password the user typed in. Provide either phone_number or message_id.

parameters.name: otp
parameters.description: The code the user typed. 3-8 digits.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: Phone the OTP was sent to. Either this OR message_id is required.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The message_id returned by generate_otp. Either this OR phone_number is required. Preferred when you may have multiple concurrent OTPs.

reason.description: On failure: invalid, expired, or 'not found'.

tools.name: check_otp_status
tools.description: Check the delivery status of a previously sent OTP. Returns DLR (Delivery Report) field on plans with DLR_ACCESS entitlement.

tools.name: extend_otp
tools.description: Extend the expiry time of an active OTP. Requires the EXTEND_OTP entitlement on your plan.

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Get the authenticated account's basic profile.

tools.name: get_usage_report
tools.description: Get a date-ranged transaction history. Requires API_REPORTING entitlement.

metadata.regions: 190+ countries via Broadnet direct carrier connections
